mapper.select: SELECT POST_ID, TITLE, CONTENTS, WRITER, VIEW_COUNT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, USER_ID FROM C_BOARD ORDER BY POST_ID DESC
SELECT POST_ID, TITLE, CONTENTS, WRITER, VIEW_COUNT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, USER_ID FROM C_BOARD WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO C_BOARD ( POST_ID, TITLE, CONTENTS, WRITER, USER_ID ) VALUES ( SEQ_C_POST_ID.NEXTVAL, -- 생성하신 시퀀스 명칭 확인 필요 #{title}, #{contents}, #{writer}, #{userId} -- 로그인한 사용자의 고유 번호 )
mapper.update: UPDATE C_BOARD SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENTS = #{contents}, WRITER = #{writer}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
